name: Aroma Pump
short_description:
Enhance your steam room experience with the Aroma Pump. Connected to the steam generator, it infuses the room with your choice of fragrance, bringing the benefits of aromatherapy—practiced for thousands of years to support mental and physical well-being—into every session. The advanced motor ensures even distribution of aroma, while integration with the steam controllers makes adjustment simple. Durable and precise, the Aroma Pump offers long-lasting performance and convenience.

SAWO’s Aroma Pump gives extremely even distribution of aroma scents, because of the advanced motor. It is very convenient to adjust with the Steam Controllers, and the pump is also very accurate and durable.

name: Steam Door
short_description:
The Steam Door keeps steam in and prevents excess moisture from escaping, ensuring a deeply reinvigorating steam room experience.

Our steam door is sealed with a rubber gasket and equipped with a magnetic lock, a stainless-steel door handle set, and a water catcher that directs condensation into the floor drain. The frame is made from rust-resistant aluminum, and the tempered-glass door is designed to withstand high temperatures. Installation is simple, using either silicone sealant or screws.

SAWO steam door is easy to mount using silicone or with screws.
features: Silicone sealant, Allen wrench and screw guide included

name: Helius NS
short_description:
The Helius delivers increased placement flexibility with its slim profile. This “hidden” heater can be installed behind the benches using a wall divider, which effectively renders the heater invisible. Once water is poured into the water basin, which is the only element that remains visible, the water then travels into the heater via a hose, heating up the room. With its advanced airflow design, the Helius uses fewer stones, which leads to better airflow and better heating efficiency.

The Helius also requires a much shorter than usual safety distance (min. 5mm). If the separate Helius hood is added, the safety distance can be made almost minimal.

short_description:
Taurus D revolutionizes the standard sauna heater by having two or more power options in the same heater. The heater is designed for industrial use, spas, and both public and private pools.

The Taurus D features an advanced sensory system that detects heating element malfunctions early. The stone container keeps the sauna stones apart from the heating elements, increasing the lifespan of the elements. Also, the heater features a cassette pull-out tray that makes any maintenance function simple, whether replacing the stones or the elements. This design reduces downtime and operational costs while ensuring long-term performance.

The control remembers your personal settings, such as session time and temperature, allowing to have consistent sauna experience.
